title: Jun 2–6 Weekly Market Report
report:
## Market Overview (Jun 2–6)

42 of 67 themes (63%) posted gains. The average theme change was +1.45%, improving from +0.82% the prior week. Semiconductor and AI-related themes rallied broadly.

The Nikkei 225 gained +2.3% on the week. NVIDIA's strong earnings outlook drove concentrated capital flows into semiconductor-related themes.

---

## Top Rising Themes

### 🥇 1st: MLCC / Electronic Components (+8.2%)

Top performer for the second consecutive week. Murata Manufacturing (6981) continued to attract buying interest, and Taiyo Yuden (6976) extended its post-earnings rally. Structural demand for AI server MLCCs keeps driving capital inflows.

### 🥈 2nd: AI Semiconductor (+7.1%)

Broad gains across AI chip stocks following NVIDIA's strong results. Advantest (6857) surged +9.2%, leading the theme.

### 🥉 3rd: Semiconductor Equipment (+5.8%)

Tokyo Electron (8035) led gains. Re-acceleration of the capex cycle is being priced in.

---

## Top Falling Themes

### 📉 1st: Shipbuilding (-5.1%)

Profit-taking continued as order backlogs are perceived to have peaked. Kawasaki Heavy Industries (7012) fell -6.3%.

### 📉 2nd: Oil & Gas (-3.2%)

OPEC+ production increase speculation weighed on crude prices, dragging down INPEX and related stocks.

---

## Macro Environment

- Nikkei 225: +2.3% (solid)
- TOPIX: +1.8%
- S&P 500: +1.9%
- USD/JPY: 156.2 (+0.5%)
- US Tech 100 (QQQ): +3.1%

---

## Key Points for Next Week

- US CPI release (Jun 11): Inflation data will drive rate cut expectations
- BOJ meeting minutes publication: Watch for hints on additional rate hikes
- MLCC volume trends: Monitor sustainability of capital inflows

---

## Investment Insights

Semiconductor and AI momentum continues, making trend-following strategies effective. However, resource-related themes like Shipbuilding and Oil are showing increasing correction pressure. Consider portfolio adjustments with theme rotation in mind.
